## motivation
* explain why this feature is necessary or why it would add value to ICON-Land

## feature description
* describe this feature and important scientific / technical aspects
* mention potential problems that could arise during implementation

## definition of done
* add concise and clear statements that define the completion of this feature


---

### NOTE - for QUINC community
* when you start working on this feature:
  * create a branch AND a merge request
    * branch naming scheme: feature/[issue number]-brief-feature-info
    * the merge request provides an easy way to both have a look at your code changes and comment individual lines of code for you and others
* in this issue you might:
  * discuss the feature
  * discuss your feature implementation, i.e., code changes and parameterization
  * get help with any issues you might face with your code changes
* use the MR:
  * for code review and related discussions
